subcodes.title: Words to Nuru'd-Din Mumtazi et al in May 1920
subcodes.first_line: [He said that He has completed His work in this world and must leave this mortal plane. But the only matter He has been unable to take care of is the House of Baha’u’llah in Baghdad]
subcodes.first_line_orig: من تمام کارهای خود را در این جهان تمام کردم و باید از این عالم بروم فقط بیت مبارک
